texto: I think we live in a world where the most important thing is daily life: sharing a space with your family, making meals, being with your people. It's not only the idea of privacy, it's the beauty of the moment, at a time in the world when everything goes really fast - too fast.
explicacao: Citação de Ana Tijoux sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “I think we live in a world where the most important thing is daily life: sharing a space with you…” articula reflexao, vida, family em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como family e beauty.
